refinement_sections.content: What kind of sorting do we need? Are we sorting by name, email, or phone number?
How large is the dataset? Is it in the millions or thousands? This affects the algorithm choice.
What is the maximum memory we can use? Are there specific limits we need to be aware of?
Do we need to maintain the order of records that have the same name or email? This could affect the sorting method.
What is the expected frequency of the searches and updates? This will help in choosing an efficient algorithm.
How many concurrent updates do we expect? This will influence how we design the sorting algorithm.
